name: Rand Paul
subject: This is horrible
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

"We've been very good at getting heart, lung, liver, because we know that, so I'm not gonna crush that part."

That's a direct quote from a video released today showing Planned Parenthood's Senior Director of Medical Services describing how she performs late-term abortions to dismember and sell body parts for profit!

Fellow Conservative, this callous disrespect for human life sickens me.

Despite their best efforts, I doubt our national media will succeed in covering this story up.

But I'm afraid that's not enough. It's time for the American people to demand Congress take action.

**[If you agree, I hope you'll sign your "Stand for Life: Defund Planned Parenthood" Petition immediately](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604185-95f679cedc-0b33a5c292)**!

Congress holds the power of the purse. So this is one measure Congress can take now -- even with President Obama in the White House.

And it's up to you and me to ensure my colleagues in Congress take action, and set the stage for a pro-life President to sign even more pro-life legislation into law once elected.

No one else will do it for us.

After all, where is the media now?

Where's the storm over this video that shows this Planned Parenthood executive bragging about performing banned partial-birth abortions and selling babies' body parts for profit?

Where are all the hard-hitting questions to pro-abortion Democrats about their support, with taxpayer dollars, for this kind of madness?

It's time for pro-lifers to take a stand. It's time to defund Planned Parenthood.

Studies show that this alone will save unborn life.

Not only that, but Members of Congress who choose to vote to keep funding Planned Parenthood will pay a severe political price in 2016, paving the way for a pro-life President to sign pro-life legislation into law.

Fellow Conservative, I believe that if our Republican Party stands strong for life, we can finally put Democrats on the defensive for their outrageous pro-abortion track record.

After all, they're the ones with a track record of standing up for partial-birth abortion. They're the ones keeping taxpayer dollars flowing to Planned Parenthood.

They're the ones who believe five and six-pound unborn babies who are still in the womb don't deserve legal protection.

Let the Abortion Lobby and their allies try and defend this madness!

**[That's why I hope you'll sign your "Stand for Life: Defund Planned Parenthood" Petition immediately](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604185-95f679cedc-0b33a5c292)**!

I am 100% pro-life. I have a 100% rating from the National Right to Life Committee.

I've also introduced the Life at Conception Act during my time in Congress to end abortion-on-demand. And as a U.S. Senator, I've cast every vote as a U.S. Senator in favor of life.

If elected President, I assure you I will do everything I can to end abortion-on-demand in America.

**[So after you've signed your petition, won't you please agree to your most generous contribution right away](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604185-95f679cedc-0b33a5c292)**?

Your generous gift will help me get my pro-life message out to as many Republican Primary voters across the country as possible.

The media may attempt to give the Abortion Lobby a pass.

But with your help, I plan to expose the radical pro-abortion views held by Hillary Clinton and top Democrats.

**[So please, sign your "Stand for Life: Defund Planned Parenthood" Petition and chip in a contribution to help defend unborn lives](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604185-95f679cedc-0b33a5c292)**.

Thank you in advance for your support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604188-d764a5ac95-0b33a5c292)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604189-5290714875-0b33a5c292)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604190-6a3b6a9225-0b33a5c292)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604191-bde37e49d9-0b33a5c292)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604185-95f679cedc-0b33a5c292)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604185-95f679cedc-0b33a5c292)

[](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604194-13b2e1ff4a-0b33a5c292) [](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604195-22c2642f0c-0b33a5c292) [](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604196-c3bc23c63b-0b33a5c292)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President
[Unsubscribe](http://if.inboxfirst.com/ga/click/2-119520316-1371-77258-165360-1604193-0877d7a6d9-0b33a5c292)

name: Jeb Bush
subject: Obama/Hillary Playbook
body:
Friend,

**My campaign is approaching a critical deadline tonight.**

We've set a goal of 10,000 Founding Members before we cut off entry forever at midnight and we are currently 1,324 short.

[**A gift of $100, $50, $25 or whatever you can afford will guarantee your Founding Member status.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cmtrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczsqljp_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

There are significant challenges ahead, and I need your support to win the fight.

If we fail, we face four more years of the same failed leadership under a different name. We don't need a continuation of the Obama playbook, we need someone who will put us on the right path.

Our best years are not behind us, they're in front of us.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xcvlkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqysbjp_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[**To ensure that future, we need your support and there are only 15 hours left for you to help us reach our First Month goal of 10,000 supporters.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xchlkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqysbjr_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Please join me now in the fight to take back America and stand up to Hillary.

Onward,

Jeb

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/qdvqyvdrhfgtncnmtvbqhtjcddtjrcyrqvpvgrchfpf_cljccqmh.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=1219&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Ben Carson
subject: This makes me sick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| Peter,

**I 'd like to ask you to join me by adding your name to an important petition.**

This week, I was sickened to see the secretly taped video of a senior Planned Parenthood official discussing the sale of aborted baby parts. In fact, I was more than sickened. I was enraged.

There is absolutely no reason why Congress should be funding Planned Parenthood with taxpayer dollars, and I believe it should stop immediately.

[**Please add your name to my petition calling on Congress to act now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29075728:27915606729:m:1:876315805:DB6D0A2CEAC48463F1FF34F2DD60695D:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29075728:27915606729:m:1:876315805:DB6D0A2CEAC48463F1FF34F2DD60695D:r)
---
I've spent my whole adult life caring for children and I cannot stand by and watch such barbarism.

I believe deeply, as it is written in the Declaration of Independence, that we are all endowed by our Creator with certain unalienable rights.

First and foremost among these unalienable rights is life, and we created a government in order to protect it -- not fund its destruction.

If I am blessed enough to win the Republican nomination and serve as your President, I will do everything in my power to advance a culture of life.

[**So I ask you to stand with me now, and sign my petition calling on Congress to do the same, and immediately stop funding the barbaric practices of Planned Parenthood.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29075728:27915606729:m:1:876315805:DB6D0A2CEAC48463F1FF34F2DD60695D:r)

Thank you for your support and participation.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29075729:27915606729:m:1:876315805:DB6D0A2CEAC48463F1FF34F2DD60695D:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29075730:27915606729:m:1:876315805:DB6D0A2CEAC48463F1FF34F2DD60695D:r)
---
|
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Ben & Jerry's message
body:
#
Friend -
I hope you enjoyed the email from Ben & Jerry yesterday -- the people, not the corporation.
The message was fun, but their point is serious: the sums of money being raised by Super PACs supporting candidates from both political parties is obscene. $103 million here, $37 million there, $15 million more for that candidate. It's grotesque -- and undemocratic.
**Our campaign is funded by small-dollar donations from people across the country. Some can hardly even afford to contribute. But they do it because they want to see our democracy taken back from the billionaire class.**
When we announced that we received over 400,000 individual contributions, we put the billionaire class on notice. But we can't stop now.
[**Strike a blow against the billionaires trying to buy the White House with your $3 contribution to our campaign today -- it's important.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2041/43f17890/5c53de44/621d8aae/2281084244/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-keep-it-going?refcode=em150715bj-o-b")
I don't have a Super PAC. I don't go to fundraisers where millionaires sit around the room and say, here's $5 million for your Super PAC. That's not my life.
And I think the success our campaign has enjoyed is a reflection of the American people saying that is not what our politics should be about.
Let's keep it going.
Bernie Sanders

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2041/43f17890/5c53de44/621d8aae/2281084244/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-keep-it-going?refcode=em150715bj-o-b")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2041/43f17890/5c53de44/621d8aaf/2281084244/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2041/43f17890/5c53de44/621d8aac/2281084244/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2041/43f17890/5c53de44/621d8aad/2281084244/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb2041/43f17890/5c53de44/621d8aaa/2281084244/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

name: Mike Huckabee
subject: grotesque
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Huckabee for President
body:
|
---
| | [ ](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNzYtZjc2ZTUzZmMtM2Q2NC00YTgxLTlmMGItMmQzZDVhODE3ODVmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Mzc2MTgwDQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vZGVmdW5kcGxhbm5lZHBhcmVudGhvb2Q%2fcz05VklJDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) Friend, The selling of unborn body parts by Planned Parenthood is grotesque and utterly disturbing. This is yet another reason I have pledged as President to defund Planned Parenthood. [Stand with me](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNzYtZjc2ZTUzZmMtM2Q2NC00YTgxLTlmMGItMmQzZDVhODE3ODVmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Mzc2MTgwDQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vZGVmdW5kcGxhbm5lZHBhcmVudGhvb2Q%2fcz05VklJDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d)! **As President, I will always stand for the sanctity of all human life from the moment of conception until the grave** . If you agree that the selling of unborn body parts is a despicable act and that Planned Parenthood must be defunded, I urge you to [endorse my pledge on my website here](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNzYtZjc2ZTUzZmMtM2Q2NC00YTgxLTlmMGItMmQzZDVhODE3ODVmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Mzc2MTgwDQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vZGVmdW5kcGxhbm5lZHBhcmVudGhvb2Q%2fcz05VklJDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d). We've also [posted the disturbing undercover video](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNzYtZjc2ZTUzZmMtM2Q2NC00YTgxLTlmMGItMmQzZDVhODE3ODVmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Mzc2MTgwDQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vZGVmdW5kcGxhbm5lZHBhcmVudGhvb2Q%2fcz05VklJDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d) of a top level Planned Parenthood employee casually discussing the sale of unborn body parts. Why? Because the national media won't report about it if we don't raise awareness. They will sweep this story under the rug and pretend like it isn't happening. IT IS HAPPENING! [Watch the video and endorse defunding Planned Parenthood here](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNzYtZjc2ZTUzZmMtM2Q2NC00YTgxLTlmMGItMmQzZDVhODE3ODVmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Mzc2MTgwDQpodHRwOi8vd3d3Lm1pa2VodWNrYWJlZS5jb20vZGVmdW5kcGxhbm5lZHBhcmVudGhvb2Q%2fcz05VklJDQp0cnVlDQpkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbQ%3d%3d). I have been leading on this issue from the beginning of this campaign. That is why I pledged to the American people, on May 14, to defund Planned Parenthood. Now, two months later, we are seeing the stark reason why this must be done. After you endorse defunding Planned Parenthood, [please chip in a contribution of $10 or more](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNzYtZjc2ZTUzZmMtM2Q2NC00YTgxLTlmMGItMmQzZDVhODE3ODVmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Mzc2MTgwDQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5taWtlaHVja2FiZWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9zPTlWSUkNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t) to help my campaign spread the message that we must defund Planned Parenthood, and end abortion once and for all. Voters need to hear this message. [Just click here to make a secure donation](http://clk.mikehuckabee.com/?r=MTAwMQ0KSjYwNzYtZjc2ZTUzZmMtM2Q2NC00YTgxLTlmMGItMmQzZDVhODE3ODVmDQozNTVkYTQwMC04NTE0LTRkNDYtYWNkMi1hZDMxYTRmMWIyOGUNCjc2MDAwMDA0Mzc2MTgwDQpodHRwczovL3d3dy5taWtlaHVja2FiZWUuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9zPTlWSUkNCnRydWUNCmRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29t). clean_body: | | | Friend, The selling of unborn body parts by Planned Parenthood is grotesque and utterly disturbing. This is yet another reason I have pledged as President to defund Planned Parenthood. ! As President, I will always stand for the sanctity of all human life from the moment of conception until the grave . If you agree that the selling of unborn body parts is a despicable act and that Planned Parenthood must be defunded, I urge you to . We've also of a top level Planned Parenthood employee casually discussing the sale of unborn body parts. Why? Because the national media won't report about it if we don't raise awareness. They will sweep this story under the rug and pretend like it isn't happening. IT IS HAPPENING! . I have been leading on this issue from the beginning of this campaign. That is why I pledged to the American people, on May 14, to defund Planned Parenthood. Now, two months later, we are seeing the stark reason why this must be done. After you endorse defunding Planned Parenthood, to help my campaign spread the message that we must defund Planned Parenthood, and end abortion once and for all. Voters need to hear this message. . We really need your help pushing this message to voters. The media won't report this story. Fighting to defund Planned Parenthood, Mike Huckabee | ---|---|--- Paid for by Huckabee for President | | * This e-mail was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Mike Huckabee for President Huckabee for President PO Box 3357 Little Rock, AR 72203 Phone: 1-844-780-6785 Fax: N/A

name: Josh Wolf, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: All eyes on Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| We're in one of the biggest races of the 2016 cycle -- and it's just getting started. Friend -- They're calling our race "one of the biggest races in 2016." Politico says that the path to a Democratic majority in the Senate in 2016 is "narrow" -- and goes on to call our primary opponent Alan Grayson "borderline unelectable in the general." This is what I'll tell you: Patrick Murphy is the only Democrat who can turn this key pickup opportunity into a win for our party. He's the only Democrat who can give our party the narrow victory we need to take back the majority in the Senate. He's the only Democrat who will focus on the issues and be ready to fight back against Tea Party Republicans. The only one. Period. **But we need to keep our momentum going if we're going to win this. We're gearing up for a big fight -- one of the biggest in 2016. Can I count on you to donate to Patrick's campaign today?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida.
